# CBAMValid — Exporter Verification Preparation Pack V5

> CBAMValid (https://cbamvalid.com) is a production-grade, verifier-preparation platform for non-EU producers, exporters, operators, importers, and CBAM reporting teams. It produces a serious operator-prepared dossier that reduces the work required for independent accredited verification under Regulation (EU) 2023/956, EU ETS AVR 2018/2067, and Implementing Regulations (EU) 2023/1776, 2023/1778, and 2025/2546.

## Product Overview & Navigation
- [Homepage](https://cbamvalid.com/) — Executive summary, platform positioning, live ROI calculator.
- [Product & Deliverables](https://cbamvalid.com/product) — 25-component dossier package breakdown and verifier readiness gates.
- [How It Works](https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works) — 4-step workflow from case setup to immutable release package.
- [Pricing & Entitlements](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing) — $300 per legal operator/installation year (100 credits = 1 Preparation Pack, 5 sealed releases included).
- [Sample Dossier Preview](https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier) — Interactive verifier dossier preview with visual geometry validation.
- [Public Signature Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify) — KMS RSA-4096 signature and document SHA-256 integrity verification engine.
- [Methodology & Calculation Rules](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology) — Server-side deterministic engine, ROUND_HALF_UP rounding, allocation reconciliation.
- [Combined Nomenclature (CN) Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code) — CN classification search and sectoral eligibility directory (Iron & Steel, Aluminum, Cement, Fertilizers, Hydrogen, Electricity).

## Canonical Deliverable Contract (25 Components)
1. **CBAMValid Verification Readiness & Evidence Assurance Dossier**: 14-page, 6-chapter structured PDF document (Executive Summary, Readiness Score, Installation & Process Boundaries, Evidence Lineage, Embedded Emission Calculations, Handover & Annexes).
2. **Complete Dossier Compilation**: Consolidated PDF of all technical annexes and operational registers.
3. **Product Scope Assessment**: System boundary and sectoral scope evaluation.
4. **CN Code Reasoning**: Detailed Combined Nomenclature classification logic.
5. **Required Data Checklist**: Completeness ledger of activity data and emission factors.
6. **Installation Monitoring Plan**: Metering, calibration, and source stream monitoring plan.
7. **Production Process Map**: Functional process units and energy/material balance diagrams.
8. **System Boundary Register**: Direct and indirect emission source boundaries.
9. **Source Stream Register**: CSV ledger of fuels, raw materials, and precursors.
10. **Emission Source Register**: Process vents, stacks, and combustion points.
11. **Measurement and Meter Register**: Metering instruments, calibration certificates, and uncertainty log.
12. **Activity Data Ledger**: Monthly/daily activity data ledger.
13. **Evidence Register**: File index with physical SHA-256 byte hashes and review statuses.
14. **Field-to-Evidence Matrix**: Crosswalk linking every calculation input to verified file hashes.
15. **Methodology Decision Log**: Documented operator choices and legal basis under EU regulations.
16. **Embedded Emissions Calculation Annex**: Step-by-step mathematical formula traces.
17. **Operator Emissions Report**: Formal operator declaration.
18. **Misstatement and Non-Conformity Register**: Detailed quality control and readiness findings.
19. **Corrective Action Log**: Corrective actions and remediation tracking.
20. **O3CI Field Mapping**: Registry-compatible structured data export mapping.
21. **Calculation Trace**: JSON node hash tree for machine-reproducible audit (`Calculation Trace.json`).
22. **Verifier Workspace**: Multi-sheet interactive Excel workbook (`Verifier Workspace.xlsx`).
23. **Data Integrity Manifest**: Cryptographic JSON manifest metadata (`Data Integrity Manifest.json`).
24. **Manifest Signature**: KMS RSA-4096 verification signature record (`Manifest Signature.sig`).
25. **Supporting Evidence Folder**: Folder containing all linked evidence files (`Supporting_Evidence/`).

## Regulatory & Quality Assurance Standards
- **Definitive Period Compliance**: Configured for 2026+ definitive reporting rules under EU Regulation 2025/2546.
- **Fail-Closed Sealing Gates**: Sealing is strictly blocked if any material data is missing, evidence coverage is under 100%, allocation shares do not sum to 1, or unapproved evidence exists.
- **Evidence Review & Scan Workflow**: Uploaded evidence files undergo byte and SHA-256 verification and status checks before operator approval for V5 readiness gating.
- **Data Confidentiality & Privacy**: User cases, raw evidence files, and generated dossiers are encrypted and isolated per tenant. All private case data is excluded from public search engines and AI indexing.

Last updated: 2026-07-22
